word: H6949 - קָהָה - qâhâh - kaw-haw' - Be set on edge

sections.paragraph:
Original: קהה

Transliteration: qâhâh

Phonetic: kaw-haw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be blunt, be dull
    1. (Qal) to be blunt, be dull
    2. (Piel) to be blunt

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1990.1

Part(s) of speech: Verb
